title: About Us

fields.label: Page Sections
fields.name: about_page_sections
fields.instructions: Add, reorder, or remove page sections. Each layout maps to a template part.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Main section heading — displayed in large uppercase.

sub_fields.label: Background Colour
sub_fields.name: background_color
sub_fields.instructions: Section background. Leave default for lavender.

sub_fields.label: Accreditation Badges
sub_fields.name: badges
sub_fields.instructions: Upload award/accreditation logos shown in a centred row.

sub_fields.label: Text Content
sub_fields.name: content
sub_fields.instructions: Left-column body text. Supports bold, lists, links.

sub_fields.label: Side Image
sub_fields.name: side_image
sub_fields.instructions: Right-column image. Recommend min 800×600 px.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Centred heading above the grid. Supports line breaks.

sub_fields.label: Card Type
sub_fields.name: card_type
sub_fields.instructions: "Image card" shows a photo. "Text + CTA" shows a coloured content box with a button.

sub_fields.label: Card Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Required for "Image card" type. Recommend 4:3 ratio.

sub_fields.label: Card Text
sub_fields.name: card_text
sub_fields.instructions: Body text shown in the yellow-green CTA card.

get_involved.name: get_involved
get_involved.label: 🤝 Get Involved (Dark navy — photo collage + numbered steps)

sub_fields.label: Photo Collage
sub_fields.name: photo_collage
sub_fields.instructions: Up to 7 community photos displayed in a staggered row. Decorative — alt text not required.

sub_fields.label: Steps
sub_fields.name: steps
sub_fields.instructions: Steps are displayed 2 per row. Content type is determined by which right-column field you fill in.

sub_fields.label: 📸 Right Content: Image
sub_fields.name: step_image
sub_fields.instructions: Fill this for an image on the right (e.g. program guide cover). Leave blank if using a form or info cards instead.

sub_fields.label: 📋 Right Content: Form Shortcode
sub_fields.name: step_form_shortcode
sub_fields.instructions: Paste a form plugin shortcode (CF7, Gravity Forms, etc.) to embed a form on the right. Leave blank if using image or info cards.

sub_fields.label: 🗂 Right Content: Info Cards
sub_fields.name: step_info_cards
sub_fields.instructions: Add white info cards on the right (e.g. Registration steps, Scholarship info). Leave empty if using image or form.

sub_fields.label: Card Content
sub_fields.name: card_content
sub_fields.instructions: Supports bold, bullet lists, and links. Use lists for registration timelines.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Short paragraph shown between the heading and the video.

sub_fields.label: YouTube Video URL
sub_fields.name: video_url
sub_fields.instructions: Full YouTube watch URL (youtube.com/watch?v=…) or short youtu.be/… URL.

sub_fields.label: Video Thumbnail (optional override)
sub_fields.name: video_thumbnail
sub_fields.instructions: If blank, the YouTube auto-thumbnail is used. Provide a custom thumbnail for better quality or privacy.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.placeholder: EXPLORE MORE ABOUT THE PARK DISTRICT

sub_fields.label: Icon Image
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: Blue icon image. Recommend SVG or PNG @2x, ~80×80 px.

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Displayed with rounded corners. Recommend min 700×500 px.

sub_fields.label: Text Content
sub_fields.name: content
sub_fields.instructions: Supports bold/italic mixed styling. Use bold text inline for emphasis (e.g. "The District is a member of WSSRA…").

sub_fields.label: Partner / Association Logo (optional)
sub_fields.name: partner_logo
sub_fields.instructions: Optional logo shown below the text content (e.g. WSSRA logo).

description: Flexible content sections for the About Us page template.
